title: Bonaveria securigera
taxonomy: Bonaveria securigera is classified as a species within the genus Bonaveria, which belongs to the phylum Ascomycota, and the class Oidiosmycotina. The phylum Ascomycota is a division of fungi that includes a wide range of species. The class Oidiosmycotina is a subgroup of the phylum Ascomycota, characterized by their unique reproductive structures. Bonaveria securigera is further classified as a member of the family Bonaveriaceae. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species.
